title: Lazy Mystical
description: The expansion of Mystical Agriculture has made it more convenient.
body:
# English (machine translation, 下方有中文)

Five levels of seed incubators are added to this module, which can rapidly produce essence by putting seeds and growth accelerators.

At the same time, the growth accelerator of Mysterious Agriculture 1.16+has been transplanted and partially modified (without changing its original function) to avoid the limited effectiveness of the growth accelerator in this module. The growth accelerator level 1 can be interchanged with Mysterious Agriculture's growth accelerator.

Linkage Mystical Agradditions has added seed cultivators and growth accelerators to this module.

# 中文
本模组添加了 5 个等级的种子培养器，可以通过放入种子和生长加速器，快速生产精华。

同时将神秘农业 1.16+ 的生长加速器移植进来，进行了部分修改（不改变原本的作用），避免本模组的生长加速器的作用不大，生长加速器 1 级 可以和神秘农业的生长加速器进行互换。

联动  神秘农业扩展 (Mystical Agradditions) ，为 此模组新增 种子培养器 和 生长加速器。
